sourceMovie.title: They Will Kill You
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto They Will Kill You (2026) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If They Will Kill You clicked for you, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1990) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after They Will Kill You?
faq.answer: Try Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze, Captain America: The First Avenger—each shares DNA with They Will Kill You while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is They Will Kill You?
faq.answer: They Will Kill You (2026) is best described as Action, Comedy, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is They Will Kill You worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
